Desarrollador Web proactivo con experiencia práctica en aplicaciones Full Stack en entornos reales. Especializado en React, .NET y SQL. Alta capacidad de adaptación y aprendizaje rápido.

))}

); } const s = { section: { minHeight: '100vh', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', padding: '120px 5% 80px', position: 'relative', overflow: 'hidden', }, grid: { position: 'absolute', inset: 0, backgroundImage: ` linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.018) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.018) 1px, transparent 1px) `, backgroundSize: '56px 56px', pointerEvents: 'none', }, glow: { position: 'absolute', right: '-4%', top: '50%', transform: 'translateY(-50%)', width: 640, height: 640, borderRadius: '50%', background: 'radial-gradient(circle, rgba(232,58,58,0.16) 0%, rgba(232,58,58,0.04) 50%, transparent 68%)', pointerEvents: 'none', }, content: { position: 'relative', zIndex: 2, maxWidth: 680 }, badge: { display: 'inline-flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8, background: 'rgba(232,58,58,0.09)', border: '1px solid rgba(232,58,58,0.22)', color: 'var(--accent2)', fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 600, letterSpacing: '0.12em', textTransform: 'uppercase', padding: '6px 16px', borderRadius: 100, marginBottom: 32, }, badgeDot: { display: 'inline-block', width: 6, height: 6, borderRadius: '50%', background: 'var(--accent)', animation: 'pulse 2s infinite', }, greeting: { fontFamily: 'var(--font-body)', fontSize: 20, fontWeight: 300, color: 'var(--text2)', marginBottom: 6, }, name: { fontFamily: 'var(--font-head)', fontSize: 'clamp(52px, 8vw, 88px)', fontWeight: 800, letterSpacing: '-3px', lineHeight: 1, color: 'var(--text)', marginBottom: 14, }, nameAccent: { color: 'var(--accent)' }, title: { fontFamily: 'var(--font-head)', fontSize: 'clamp(20px, 3.5vw, 32px)', fontWeight: 500, color: 'var(--text2)', letterSpacing: '-0.5px', marginBottom: 6, }, tagline: { fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 500, letterSpacing: '0.12em', textTransform: 'uppercase', color: 'var(--accent)', marginBottom: 28, }, desc: { fontSize: 17, fontWeight: 300, color: 'var(--text2)', lineHeight: 1.78, maxWidth: 520, marginBottom: 44, }, strong: { color: 'var(--text)', fontWeight: 500 }, actions: { display: 'flex', gap: 14, flexWrap: 'wrap', alignItems: 'center' }, btnPrimary: { background: 'var(--accent)', color: '#fff', border: 'none', padding: '14px 32px', borderRadius: 8, fontFamily: 'var(--font-body)', fontSize: 15, fontWeight: 500, cursor: 'pointer', textDecoration: 'none', transition: 'background 0.2s, transform 0.15s', boxShadow: '0 4px 22px rgba(232,58,58,0.28)', display: 'inline-block', }, btnSecondary: { background: 'transparent', color: 'var(--text)', border: '1px solid var(--border2)', padding: '13px 30px', borderRadius: 8, fontFamily: 'var(--font-body)', fontSize: 15, fontWeight: 400, cursor: 'pointer', textDecoration: 'none', transition: 'border-color 0.2s, transform 0.15s', display: 'inline-block', }, stats: { display: 'flex', gap: 44, marginTop: 60, paddingTop: 40, borderTop: '1px solid var(--border)', }, stat: {}, statNum: { fontFamily: 'var(--font-head)', fontSize: 38, fontWeight: 800, color: 'var(--text)', lineHeight: 1, }, statAccent: { color: 'var(--accent)' }, statLabel: { fontSize: 12, color: 'var(--text3)', marginTop: 4 }, avatarWrap: { position: 'absolute', right: '5%', top: '50%', transform: 'translateY(-50%)', zIndex: 2, }, ring: { width: 320, height: 320, borderRadius: '50%', border: '1.5px solid rgba(232,58,58,0.35)', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', position: 'relative', }, ringInner: { position: 'absolute', inset: 12, borderRadius: '50%', border: '1px solid rgba(232,58,58,0.15)', }, avatar: { width: 272, height: 272, borderRadius: '50%', background: 'var(--bg3)', border: '1px solid var(--border2)', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', fontFamily: 'var(--font-head)', fontSize: 64, fontWeight: 800, color: 'var(--accent)', letterSpacing: '-3px', }, dot: { position: 'absolute', width: 12, height: 12, borderRadius: '50%', background: 'var(--accent)', opacity: 0.4, }, };
